offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month, complex submission processes cause delays in project timelines. We simplify the permit creation and submission instead of manual submission through local government websites.
problem: Delays in permit approval due to complex submission processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly permit creation and status tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
